GPIO Configuration Register 1

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x74
Size:
0x4
Source:
gpio_rf.rdl

Description

Read-only encoded hardware configuration parameters. Present only when GPIO_ADD_ENCODED_PARAMS=True.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:22] reserved rw 0x0 -
[21] int_both_edge r 0x0 INTERRUPT_BOTH_EDGE_TYPE
[20:16] id_width r 0x1f ENCODED_ID_WIDTH
[15] gpio_id r 0x1 GPIO_ID
[14] add_encoded_params r 0x1 ADD_ENCODED_PARAMS
[13] debounce_cfg r 0x1 DEBOUNCE
[12] porta_intr r 0x1 PORTA_INTR
[11] hw_portd r 0x0 HW_PORTD
[10] hw_portc r 0x0 HW_PORTC
[9] hw_portb r 0x0 HW_PORTB
[8] hw_porta r 0x0 HW_PORTA
[7] portd_single_ctl r 0x1 PORTD_SINGLE_CTL
[6] portc_single_ctl r 0x1 PORTC_SINGLE_CTL
[5] portb_single_ctl r 0x1 PORTB_SINGLE_CTL
[4] porta_single_ctl r 0x1 PORTA_SINGLE_CTL
[3:2] num_ports r 0x0 NUM_PORTS
[1:0] apb_data_width r 0x2 APB_DATA_WIDTH

Field Descriptions

int_both_edge - INTERRUPT_BOTH_EDGE_TYPE

0=rising or falling edge only, 1=both edges generate interrupt.

id_width - ENCODED_ID_WIDTH

GPIO ID width (GPIO_ID_WIDTH parameter value).

gpio_id - GPIO_ID

0=GPIO_ID not included, 1=GPIO_ID included.

add_encoded_params - ADD_ENCODED_PARAMS

0=encoded parameters not present, 1=encoded parameters present.

debounce_cfg - DEBOUNCE

0=debounce not included, 1=debounce included.

porta_intr - PORTA_INTR

0=Port A not an interrupt source, 1=Port A used as interrupt source.

hw_portd - HW_PORTD

0=Port D auxiliary hardware signals excluded, 1=included.

hw_portc - HW_PORTC

0=Port C auxiliary hardware signals excluded, 1=included.

hw_portb - HW_PORTB

0=Port B auxiliary hardware signals excluded, 1=included.

hw_porta - HW_PORTA

0=Port A auxiliary hardware signals excluded, 1=included.

portd_single_ctl - PORTD_SINGLE_CTL

0=Port D multi-source control, 1=Port D single-source control.

portc_single_ctl - PORTC_SINGLE_CTL

0=Port C multi-source control, 1=Port C single-source control.

portb_single_ctl - PORTB_SINGLE_CTL

0=Port B multi-source control, 1=Port B single-source control.

porta_single_ctl - PORTA_SINGLE_CTL

0=Port A multi-source control, 1=Port A single-source control.

num_ports - NUM_PORTS

Number of ports: 0=1 port, 1=2, 2=3, 3=4.

apb_data_width - APB_DATA_WIDTH

APB data bus width: 0=8-bit, 1=16-bit, 2=32-bit.
